case_title: THE TIDES CENTER VS. RICKY TIMMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TIMMS, RICKY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIMMS, RICKY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 238 EDDY STREET, #519, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TIMMS, RICKY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TIMMS, RICKY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ;ENDOSED COPY RETURNED IN SAEA.
